creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 177636
svn(1) diff, makefile only

Hi woodsb02@,

After reviewing your proposed patch, it all looks good- but I counter-propose the attached patch in place of your Makefile patch. I applied yours, then made the following changes:

1.) Added back in the BROKEN=, so that users of affected versions (to include 11.0-RELEASE) are notified.
2.) Removed redundant xcursor in X11_USE (reported by z7dr6ut7gs@snkmail.com, PR 214956)
3.) Added in jbeich@'s recommended aarch64 NEON bits

If this looks good, I'd also like to ping jbeich@ and mikael.urankar@gmail.com so that they can take a peek at the revised form and make sure it still looks OK to them if they wish to.
